sys_script_include.description: This script contains the Out of Office functionality for DTech Apps 2.8.1 | 2023-01-23 | raj | STRY0134743 - Out of Office Message on Task Request Form 2.8 .1 | 2023-01-19 | raj | DFCT0011483 - Stretch:Org Hier Tree/Bi-Fold, select "Organizational Member" clicks on the tab "Out of Office Schedule" or "Out of Office History" tab does NOT display rows 2.8.1 | 2023-01-18 | raj | DFCT0011588 - When clearing "Suspense Date" on the New Task form, then selecting "Assigned Member" should NOT display There is a JavaScript error in your browser console 2.8.1 | 2023-01-17 | raj | STRY0130628 - Out of Office Modal- Success and Warning Toast 2.8.1 | 2023-01-17 | raj | DFCT0011561 - "Conflicting OOO Tasks" Banner Notification does NOT update when there is a new conflicting tasks is created 2.8.1 | 2023-01-17 | raj | DFCT0011559 - List of "Conflicted Out of Office Tasks" only checks the first record "Out of Office Schedule" 2.8.1 | 2023-01-17 | raj | STRY0130998 - Publishing Tasks Modal- Add OOO Warning 2.8.1 | 2023-01-09 | raj | STRY0131003 - Task Tree- OOO Visual Indicators 2.8.1 | 2022-12-30| raj | DFCT0011562- Banner Notification "My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office)" filter criteria SHOULD display Task (IS) Active 2.8.1 | 2022-12-30| raj | DFCT0011556 - Banner Notification "My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office)" should NOT display to the ALL user without any existing OOO schedules 2.8.1 | 2022-12-30| raj | DFCT0011555 - Banner Notification "My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office)" should NOT display the Draft task 2.8.1 | 2022-12-20| raj | STRY0130630 - Banner Notification & Task List- My Conflicting Schedules (Out of Office) 2.8.1 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130635 - Task Form- Assignee is Out of Office
sys_script_include.name: Out_of_Office
